name: Pizzeria Sei
teaser: Currently the best Neapolitan in the city. No pizzeria comes up with more creative specials that actually work.
review:
Currently the best Neapolitan in the city. They're doing a nod to Tokyo Neapolitan — punching the edges to give the crust more texture — but it mostly just tastes like a great, supple, wood-fired Neapolitan.

Sei doesn't travel at all and it's occasionally overtopped in my opinion, but there isn't a pizzeria I can think of that comes up with more creative combinations for specials that actually work. I haven't done the omakase yet, but I'd trust these folks to blow my mind.
headsUp: Omakase option available. Highly recommended if seats open up.
update: Still the best Neapolitan in the city. Specials remain creative.
address: 8547 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90069
